title: Sanji Dives to Save Him
description: On pages 6–9, sanji dives to save him focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.
scene: On pages 6–9, sanji dives to save him focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's the guy from the village...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I hope I'm not too late!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: My breath is going to run out too if I don't hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Sorry... We're not strong enough to pull your body out,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But we'll at least try to make you cough up all the water you swallowed so you can breathe!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Since they can't break the rock, they've stretched his neck instead so he can breathe!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...which means all I have to do is break this rock,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And leave the rest to that old man!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: Hmph, one of the cocoyashi Villagers is trying to save him...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You think that trying to extend his life by doing that,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Will change your fates in any way!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You can drown here with that boy too!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You seriously wish to fight me underwater...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even though as an inferior human, you're already at your limit just by trying to hold your breath...!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
